title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group:
Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products Global Group!
